Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 123 

IMNZTN_TYPE_CD 

LABEL: Immunization Type Code 

DESCRIPTION: This field identifies the type of immunization provided in order to track additional detail not currently 
contained in CPT codes. 

SHORT NAME: IMNZTN_TYPE_CD 

LONG NAME: IMNZTN_TYPE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): All line files 

VALUES: 
00 = None 
01 = Anthrax 
02 =
